      339 -    let is_working = if *agent_type == AgentType::Cc {
      340 -        CC_SPINNER_OUTPUT.iter().any(|re| re.is_match(&last_20))
      341 -    } else {
      342 -        false
      343 -    };
      344 -
      345 -    // 5. Conflict resolution: idle beats working keywords
      346 -    //    (prompt at end overrides stale "reading"/"writing" in scrollback)
      332      if is_idle {
      333          return AgentStatus::Idle;
      334      }
      350 -    if is_working {
      351 -        return AgentStatus::Working;
      335 +
      336 +    // 3. Rate limit — only checked if NOT idle. Broad patterns are fine
      337 +    //    here because we've already ruled out idle agents (whose scrollback
      338 +    //    might contain "rate limit" in conversation prose).
      339 +    for pat in &patterns.rate_limit {
      340 +        if last_50.contains(pat) {
      341 +            return AgentStatus::RateLimited;
      342 +        }
      343      }
      344
      354 -    // 6. Error detection (last 10 lines)
      345 +    // 4. Working detection (CC spinner patterns in last 20 lines)
      346 +    if *agent_type == AgentType::Cc {
      347 +        if CC_SPINNER_OUTPUT.iter().any(|re| re.is_match(&last_20)) {
      348 +            return AgentStatus::Working;
      349 +        }
      350 +    }
      351 +
      352 +    // 5. Error detection (last 10 lines) — only if not idle
      353      for pat in &patterns.error {
      354          if last_10.contains(pat) {
      355              return AgentStatus::Error;
      356          }
      357      }
      358
      361 -    // 7. If there's content but no prompt and no spinner, assume working
      359 +    // 6. If there's content but no prompt and no spinner, assume working
      360      //    (output is streaming, hasn't settled to a prompt yet)
      361      if !output.trim().is_empty() {
      362          return AgentStatus::Working;

⏺ Bash(cd /Users/tdavies/dev/tdavies/agent-tmux-tools && cargo build --release --quiet 2>&1 | grep "^error"
       ; cp target/release/ta ~/.local/bin/ta && echo "Installed")
  ⎿  Installed
  ⎿  Shell cwd was reset to /Users/tdavies/dev/active/agent-flywheel/ntm
  ⎿  (timeout 3m)

⏺ The key change: idle is checked first, before rate-limit or error. If the agent has a prompt visible and
  no active spinner, it's idle — period. Rate limit and error patterns are only checked for agents that
  aren't at a prompt, so conversation prose about "rate limits" or Error: Exit code 1 from tool output
  won't trigger false positives.

✻ Churned for 2m 20s

❯ let's analyze the code base, and create tests that reflect the code reality. Also include a variety of
scenarios for testing agent detection.. see if ntm has any. Also use this tmux collection of sessions.. I
can put the system in a couple idle and working modes, and let's make sure these tests work.

⏺ Explore(Explore ntm agent detection tests)
  ⎿  Done (30 tool uses · 73.5k tokens · 53s)
  (ctrl+o to expand)

⏺ Good research. Now let me capture the actual live pane output from your sessions to build realistic test
  fixtures.
